text: Please add a "Attach image(s)" button in the evaluate reply inputs, just to the left of "Submit Reply" (and re-use/modularize as much of the code as possible from the Attach Images button in the main evaluate feedback input

proposedTasks.title: Add image attachment support to Evaluate reply inputs
proposedTasks.description:
Add an 'Attach image(s)' button to the reply input in the Evaluate phase, positioned immediately to the left of the 'Submit Reply' button. Reuse and modularize the existing image-attachment logic from the main Evaluate feedback input (file picker, preview thumbnails, removal, upload handling) into a shared component or hook so both the top-level feedback form and the reply form use the same code path. Acceptance criteria:
- A shared ImageAttachment component (or hook) is extracted from the existing main feedback input implementation.
- The reply input renders an 'Attach image(s)' button to the left of 'Submit Reply'.
- Clicking the button opens a file picker filtered to image types.
- Selected images display as removable thumbnail previews within the reply composer.
- Submitted replies persist attached images in the FeedbackItem reply data.
- The main feedback input is refactored to use the same shared component/hook with no regression.
- Works in both light and dark themes.

taskTitles: Add image attachment support to Evaluate reply inputs
